free_text: Measurement of cross section for neutron induced
reactions at 14 MeV via activation technique
Progress report on IAEA research contract No.2498/RB
Detector efficiency, branching ratios and internal
conversion coefficients were taken into account in the
Total error, this includes systematical errors
Work supported by IAEA research contract
NO.2498/RB. Data taken from progress report received
VP. Data for four (n,2n) reactions added.
SD: Evaluator's remark was added to Sub.009
Evaluator's remark: Suspicious data. Value for cross
section and error more than 4 times large. However,
this is consistent with the total (n,2n).
